headline: Here are three political story lines to watch this week: Texas face-off, Trump’s health and the Iran talks. Read more in today’s WSJ Politics newsletter:
State Attorney General Ken Paxton clinched the Texas Republican nomination for U.S. Senate, defeating longtime Sen. John Cornyn
Israel says new head of Hamas' military wing killed in Gaza City strikes
Christian Menefee Defeats Al Green in Texas Democratic House Runoff
Supreme Court denies NFL’s bid to keep former Dolphins coach Brian Flores’ discrimination lawsuit from heading to court
Russia ramps up threats against Ukraine. What does that say about the war?
Spencer Pratt reveals stunning West Coast destination for LA’s homeless if he wins election: ‘The mayor will welcome them’
Possible serial killer is latest horror to upend Mexico World Cup host region — two weeks before first match
Mamdani admits Ken Griffin ghosted him after viral video — but doubles down on billionaires like Jeff Bezos paying ‘fair share’ of taxes
Canada clamping down on travel, immigration from central Africa amid Ebola outbreak
